service.name: OpenAI Moderation API
service.description_for_ai: Free content moderation API from OpenAI. Detect hate speech, harassment, self-harm, violence, sexual content in text. No cost. Use for moderating user-generated content before publishing.

auth.cost: Free — included with OpenAI API account

capabilities.description_for_ai: Check text for policy violations: hate, harassment, self-harm, violence, sexual content. Returns scores per category. Free API.

input.description: Text to moderate. Can be single string or array.

agent_hints.free: This endpoint is FREE even with paid plan. Use liberally.
agent_hints.threshold: flagged=true means content violates policy. category_scores give confidence 0-1.
agent_hints.languages: Works across many languages, not just English.
